2402480.name: 비가 오기 시작했지만, 낙엽은 이미 젖어있었다 Original Soundtrack
2402480.description:
It's the original soundtrack from "Beginning of the Rain". Theme songs with calm background music and vocals with emotional melodies that further increase the immersion level of the game. It contains songs with beautiful lyrics that are meaningful to each atmosphere.

Based on the dreamy sound of the piano, I composed it in pursuit of harmony of various instruments. I made the background so that it fits the work and can exist independently other than the work. And, I sang including an emotional melody that fits that background. Listen to this soundtrack and get more immersed in the game and feel the musical sensibility!
